brand_identity.name: Darshan Lovely Events
brand_identity.personality: The elegant host. Welcoming, organized, culturally rich but visually disciplined.

secondary.name: Leaf Green
secondary.usage: Beeda sections, Freshness indicators, Success states

buttons.primary: bg-[#E35F26] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium hover:bg-[#c44e1e] transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-[#2E5C38] text-[#2E5C38] px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium hover:bg-[#2E5C38] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-full flex items-center gap-2 hover:bg-[#20bd5a] transition-all shadow-md

cards.feature: bg-white p-8 rounded-xl shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] border border-[#D4AF37]/20 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-colors
cards.menu_item: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300

visual_enhancers.textures: Add subtle grain overlay to backgrounds for paper-like feel.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Lucide React icons with stroke-width 1.5 for elegance.

hero_slideshow.alt: Traditional Indian festive decor with marigold colors
Elegant event table setting with flowers

instructions_to_main_agent: Use the specific Hex codes provided. Do not rely on default Tailwind colors.
Implement the Hero Section as a full-screen slideshow with text overlay.
The 'Why Choose Us' section should use the 'Feature Cards' style defined in components.
Menu section must use tabs or filterable bento grid to handle the variety (Beeda, Ice Cream, etc.).
Contact section must clearly display the two phone numbers with WhatsApp and Call options.
Gallery should be a masonry layout mixing the provided stock images.
Video section: Create a placeholder container with an elegant 'Play' button overlay, implying user-uploaded content.
Use Playfair Display for all Headings (H1-H3) and Lato/Sans for body text. Import them via Google Fonts in index.css.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are added to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do not center align long paragraphs.
Use adequate padding inside cards (p-6 or p-8).
Ensure contrast ratios are met (dark text on light background).
